name: read-chinese-classics
description: Next.js site for 三国演义 reading

scripts.build:content: npm run content:export && npm run build
scripts.content:release: npm run content:export && gsutil -m rsync -r -d public/content gs://zh-books
scripts.preview: sh -ac 'set -a; [ -f ./.env.prod ] && . ./.env.prod; set +a; opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare preview'
scripts.deploy: sh -ac 'set -a; [ -f ./.env.prod ] && . ./.env.prod; set +a; opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy'
